/tmp/codeql-scratch-9b1e34f99f25cc02/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/TimeMosaic.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/TimeMosaic.dir/src/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeMosaic.dir/src/color.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeMosaic.dir/src/exif.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeMosaic.dir/src/export_png.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeMosaic.dir/src/image_io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeMosaic.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeMosaic.dir/src/mosaic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeMosaic.dir/src/scan.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeMosaic.dir/src/time_parse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeMosaic.dir/src/ui.cpp.o -o TimeMosaic  libimgui_lib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so libtinyexif.a libstb_impl.a -ldl _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
